steps.title: Use the parallel slope
steps.content: The line $y=7x+3$ has slope $7$. Since line $l$ is parallel to it, line $l$ also has slope $7$.

steps.title: Write line l
steps.content:
Line $l$ passes through $(0,0)$, so its equation is
$$y=7x$$

steps.title: Substitute the given point
steps.content:
The point $(5,d)$ lies on line $l$, so substitute $x=5$ and $y=d$.
$$d=7(5)=35$$
The answer is 35.
